sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, sample_string String, sample_number UInt32);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'abcdefg', 7), (2, 'hijklmnop', 8), (3, '', 9), (4, NULL, NULL);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE sample_number = ALL (SELECT length(right(sample_string, 3)) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AND sample_string != '';
SELECT right(sample_string, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE sample_number = 8)) AS right_string FROM test_table WHERE sample_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, right(sample_string, -1) FROM test_table HAVING right(sample_string, 1) = 'g' AND id = ALL (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE sample_number IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, right(sample_string, 2) AS right_substring FROM test_table WHERE sample_string IS NOT NULL;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN right_substring IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM temp_table GROUP BY right_substring HAVING right_substring = ALL (SELECT right(sample_string, 3) FROM test_table WHERE id = 2);
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, right(sample_string, -2) FROM test_table WHERE sample_number = 9;
SELECT id, right(sample_string, 0) AS empty_right_string FROM test_table WHERE sample_string = ALL (SELECT sample_string FROM test_table WHERE id = 3);
